name: Public Joint Stock Company SAFMAR Financial investments
summary: Public Joint Stock Company √Ç¬ìSAFMAR Financial Investments√Ç¬î, an investment holding, operates in the financial sector. The company leases passenger cars, commercial vehicles, self-propelled machines, buses, and other assets. It also offers life and property, motor, health, and other insurance products; compulsory pension insurance services; corporate and individual pension plans; and POS lending brokerage services. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Moscow, Russia.
